title: randia virosa
intro: Randia virosa, also known as the poisonous Randia or sour randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the Caribbean and Central America, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts of Randia virosa have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, Randia virosa is prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also used in the form of a poultice or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
